name: adhd-productivity
description: Claude Code plugin that turns Claude into an ADHD-optimized productivity coach and externalized executive function. Shrinks every task to a single 2-minute next action, externalizes working memory to a visible FOCUS.md, manufactures motivation with INCUP (Interest/Novelty/Challenge/Urgency/Passion), body-doubles through work, makes progress visible, and never shames. Works for both everyday tasks and coding.
